text: **Anna:** Some people at the start of a new year make a {resolution|決意/目標|/ˌrezəˈluːʃən/|My New Year's resolution is to exercise more.}
**Anna:** A {promise|約束/誓い|/ˈprɒmɪs/|I promise to study hard.} to yourself to be better
**Anna:** I thought about my resolution carefully.
**Anna:** I want to be an {actor|俳優/演技者|/ˈæktər/|He is a famous movie actor.} on the {stage|舞台|/steɪdʒ/|She performs on stage.}
**Anna:** Today I will {audition|オーディション/試験|/ˈɔːdiʃən/|I will audition for the play.} for a show called The Woods Are Alive.
**Director:** Are you ready to {audition|オーディション/試験|/ˈɔːdiʃən/|I will audition for the play.}?
**Director:** You are {lost|迷った/道に迷った|/lɒst/|I am lost in the city.} in the woods.
**Anna:** You are {searching|探している/捜索している|/ˈsɜːrtʃɪŋ/|I am searching for my keys.} {desperately|必死に/切実に|/ˈdespərətli/|He desperately wants to win.} for a way out.
**Director:** Anna, you are speaking too {softly|静かに/控えめに|/ˈsɔːftli/|She spoke softly to her friend.}
**Anna:** Can you speak more {loudly|大きな声で/loudに|/ˈlaʊdli/|Speak loudly so everyone can hear.} and a little more um seriously?
**Director:** Yes, that is {loud|大きい/音量が高い}/ˈlaʊd/|The music is too loud.} enough.
**Director:** In this scene, you are {moving|動く/移動する}/ˈmuːvɪŋ/|Please move closer to me.} slowly and {quietly|静かに}/ˈkwaɪətli/|Speak quietly in the library.} through the woods
**Director:** Anna Anna, you are walking quickly and {loudly|大声で}/ˈlaʊdli/|He was speaking loudly in the meeting.}.
**Anna:** I am walking slowly and quietly
**Director:** Anna, you don't need to say slowly and quietly.
**Director:** Alright, let's try the last {scene|場面/シーン}/siːn/|This is my favorite scene in the movie.}.
**Director:** I say my line first, then you say your line
**Director:** You will never get out of these woods {alive|生きて}/əˈlaɪv/|Are you alive after the accident?}!
**Director:** Okay, Anna, you said that line.
**Director:** You said that line really late.
**Director:** You need to say it earlier.
**Director:** You will never get out of the woods alive.
**Anna:** I was too early, wasn't I?
**Director:** I think I have the {perfect|完璧な/理想的な}/ˈpɜːrfɪkt/|She gave a perfect performance.} part for you.
**Director:** The {costume|衣装}/ˈkɒstuːm/|He wore a traditional costume.} is in the back.
**Director:** Please go {try|試す/挑戦する|/traɪ/|Try this new recipe.} it on.
**Director:** Oh, Anna, that {fits|合う/ぴったりだ|/fɪts/|This shirt fits me well.} you perfectly.
**Anna:** I'm a {tree|木|/triː/|The tree is tall and green.}
**Anna:** In the {woods|森|/wʊdz/|We walked through the woods.} are alive!
**Anna:** My new year is starting {awesomely|素晴らしく|/ˈɔːsəmli/|She performed awesomely in the competition.}!
**Anna:** I have a {great|素晴らしい/素晴らしな|/greɪt/|What a great day!} idea for my tree.
